title: gastrochilus ciliaris
intro: Gastrochilus ciliaris, also known as the Yellow-veined Dendrobium, is an orchid species native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Gastrochilus ciliaris include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a sought-after herb in traditional medicine. It is often prepared as a decoction or tincture for medicinal use, and is also used in various herbal preparations, including teas and capsules, to harness its therapeutic properties.
